title: Data Scientist
description: Data Scientists analyze and interpret complex data to help organizations make informed, data-driven decisions. They build predictive models using statistical techniques, machine learning, and programming.

topics.name: Learn Python Programming
topics.description: Master Python basics: variables, data types, lists, dictionaries, loops, functions, and file handling.

topics.name: Git & GitHub Basics
topics.description: Understand version control to track your code changes and collaborate with other developers.

topics.name: Linear Algebra & Calculus
topics.description: Focus on vectors, matrices, derivatives, and optimization techniques essential for ML models.

topics.name: NumPy & Pandas
topics.description: Learn to load, clean, manipulate, and analyze structured datasets using Python's core data libraries.

topics.name: Matplotlib & Seaborn
topics.description: Visualize data patterns, trends, and distributions using standard plotting libraries.

topics.name: Probability & Statistics
topics.description: Study descriptive statistics, probability distributions, hypothesis testing, and regression analysis.

topics.name: SQL & Relational Databases
topics.description: Write queries to select, filter, join, and aggregate data from databases like PostgreSQL or MySQL.

topics.name: Introduction to Machine Learning
topics.description: Learn supervised (regression, classification) and unsupervised (clustering) ML algorithms using Scikit-Learn.

topics.name: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
topics.description: Perform end-to-end data analysis projects to discover insights and prepare data for modeling.

semesters.semester: Semester 4: Advanced ML, Deep Learning & Projects

topics.name: Deep Learning Fundamentals
topics.description: Understand neural networks, activation functions, and frameworks like TensorFlow or PyTorch.

topics.name: Big Data & Cloud Intro
topics.description: Get familiar with Spark and basic cloud data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery).
resources: AWS Academy / Google Cloud Skills Boost

topics.name: Capstone Project & Portfolio
topics.description: Build an end-to-end data science project, host it on GitHub, and write a detailed README or blog post.
